site.description: Bishun helps learners of all backgrounds master Chinese character writing with correct stroke order animations, pronunciation, meanings, random writing practice, and character origin and history content.

seo.title: Bishun | Learn Hanzi Stroke Order

seo.twitterDescription: Learn correct Hanzi stroke order with animated writing, pronunciation, meanings, random practice, and character origin insights.

features.title: Everything you need to master Hanzi

strokeOrder.title: Stroke Order Animations
strokeOrder.description: Watch each character come to life with step-by-step animated stroke order guidance.

pronunciation.title: Pronunciation
pronunciation.description: Learn accurate pinyin pronunciation for every character.

meanings.title: Meanings & Definitions
meanings.description: Understand the meaning of every character with clear, concise definitions.

practice.title: Random Writing Practice
practice.description: Test your knowledge with randomized character writing exercises.

etymology.title: Character Origins & History
etymology.description: Explore the fascinating history and etymology behind each Chinese character.

radicals.title: Radicals & Components
radicals.description: Learn the building blocks of Chinese characters by recognizing common radicals and their meanings.
